title: UCSD COLLEGE RANKING EXPLAINED | UPDATED
body: I got into Revelle after being admitted from the waitlist despite having it ranked near the bottom. I play piano professionally (I practice several hours a day) and am majoring in business economics in order to have the skills to start a brand around my name after graduation, but i fear that the GEs in Revelle will consume so much time and might even interfere with my graduation. Do you have any tips on some steps I could possibly take to make this more manageable for me without mentally burning out?

title: The TRUTH About USC… #usc #college #collegelife #university
body:
I was middle class and got accepted into USC…

Half my school was scholarships, the other half loans.

I had a full time job while going to school there.

In fact, all my close friends I met there were also middle class…

Everyone being rich who goes there isn’t true.

But, my maid did go to UCLA!

✌🏻
author: @sandramiller1988

title: The TRUTH About USC… #usc #college #collegelife #university
body: USC is a fantastic school, well worth attending (the "hood" part is bit exaggerated). ...but in a state with Stanford, Cal, UCLA, UCSB, UCSD, Caltech and the Claremont Colleges, it sort of gets lost.
author: @waynesimpson4081

title: Campus Tour | Marshall University
body:
Haiku 2

The Ghost In Me

I see I am the Holy Ghost
Jesus lives again today
God is loving me as my eyes set in

The love is my eyes on holidays
The wrench is goal
But why is my eyes holiday when I'm screwed

Woe is my eye when I screw
And the driver wrecked
But to the fall was the primary fall out

I died that day as a man
And the fall tired
I weep as Ghost in catastrophe that spilled my guts

I behold my lying eyes and gale
I weep no more
And the day is ended as I support me

My Ghost is a Free Mason I
I live again anigh
I struggle to ghost my expression as I weep

No more shells and cheese for me
I smile at Chester
He killed me with a gun I knew existed

And the lying I twisted as Irupped
I galed down atop
I erupted atop a window seal alive and bold

I'm alive
I'm alive, I said


by James Dean Jarvis

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: Oh, it's cool to see people like you. I really liked how you showed the division into anesthesiologists. This immediately becomes clear to people not connected with medicine. There are people in my country who have no idea what an anesthesiologist does. I am glad that you have a good team and such a high-tech hospital, it is my dream to work with you in Florida. I am also an anesthesiologist in Russia, but unfortunately, the process of legalizing a diploma is very expensive for me, in order to complete an internship with you, I need to save money for half a year. Good luck colleagues! Quiet duty, as they say in our country!
author: @ghostknight6815

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: Finished my residency here at UF Shands Jacksonville (University Medical Center then) 28 years ago. It was a great experience! Anesthesia has been a great career for me. Every day is rewarding. I highly recommend it! Thanks for the post. It brought back lots of memories.
author: @garyfeldmann4084

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: I'm being honest, at first I don't find anything special about anesthesiologist and why it's so important in OR but after doing some research, watching videos about anesthesia and anesthesiologist lives, it makes me have a second thought. I love it how anesthesiologist checks the bp of the patient and more while other surgeon do the surgery. It makes anesthesiologist looks like a guardian angels who keeps someone safe
author: @orangensh34

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: The Music helps me have a optimistic mind with surgery and others thing happen when I’m in Hospital because surgery for me it’s a nightmare 😢😢
author: @GiaKhanhTran-y2r

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: As i have passion about orthopaedic surgery faculty but after some try it looks tough for me. Then I tried for anaesthesiology. Here it comes when i start training in anaesthesia. Its super specialised subject which makes surgeons and patients safe during surgery and also there is branch for critical care and pain medicine which another world of anaesthesiology. I wonder how specialised it is! ❤
author: @aasifsarwar3303

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body: bless ya so much hard work to become an dr I'm sure in end your get there i hope one day to help teach medical students as one of there body donors as I'm thermally ill young man  so decided to give consent to body donation in hope to help teach medical students Anatomy  i wish all well in there studies and pray you carry on to become great dr take care
author: @michaelskuce3677

title: Day in the Life: Anesthesiology Residency at University of Florida Jacksonville
body:
I hope to come back to this comment in a couple years to follow up.

More than halfway through my BSN now. Main goal is to become an Anesthesiologist. Open to obstetrics or general. Backup is Radiation Oncologist.

Hope one of you will see this comment down the road and follow up to remind me to come back and update you all!
author: @TessaRoloson

title: Marshall University - Official College Video Tour
body: I attended Marshall for 2 1/2 years in the 1970s. The last time I was there was during the summer of 2008. There was a bar called the Coffee House in the basement of the student union that featured live bands on the weekends.

title: Marshall Like You've Never Seen It Before | Drone Fly Through of Campus
body: I never saw this Extended Version... only the part the NCAA rasies Hell about at the Football game... But Great Shots I Love It... eat your heart out NCAA 25...
author: @TheLegendofBrettMorrison

title: Marshall Like You've Never Seen It Before | Drone Fly Through of Campus
body:
WE ARE........MARSHALL. The University looks amazing! Anne & I reside in N. Carolina and are both graduates of Marshall. I remain a season ticket holder to HERD football...and donate my two seats to Huntington's Boys-Girls Club when we don't drive to WV for a game.
We are excited about the 2024 schedule and hopefully, we will see you "along the Thundering HERD Highway!"

Anne & Gary in Charlotte 😎
author: @garysweeney753

title: Marshall Like You've Never Seen It Before | Drone Fly Through of Campus
body: That's not as huge as many universities I've seen.  Some of those places are so big, you spend as much (or more) time going from class to class as you spend IN the class.   By the way, my grandfather was the architect who designed the Morrow Library maybe 100 years ago.
author: @ColonelMarcellus
